templates.verification_success: ✅ Thank you! Your submission has been received and verified. Welcome aboard!
templates.awaiting_screenshot: Great! Now please send a screenshot showing that you've saved the contact.
templates.please_confirm_first: Please reply with *DONE* first before sending the screenshot.
templates.deal_confirmed_buyer: 🤝 Great news! The seller has agreed to your deal. Expect to be contacted shortly.
templates.deal_confirmed_seller: 🤝 Great news! The buyer has confirmed the deal.
templates.funnel_welcome: 👋 Hi {{contact.name}}! Thanks for your interest. Reply *YES* to learn more.
templates.funnel_details: Here are the details you requested: {{tenant.funnel_details_url}}
